mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_application ( application_id, applicant_id_no, applicant_name, applicant_gender, applicant_birthdate, relationship_to_insured, insured_id_no, product_code, sum_insured, annual_premium, application_status, submission_time, created_by ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{applicantIdNo}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantGender}, #{applicantBirthdate}, #{relationshipToInsured}, #{insuredIdNo}, #{productCode}, #{sumInsured}, #{annualPremium}, #{applicationStatus}, #{submissionTime}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT application_id, applicant_id_no, applicant_name, applicant_gender, applicant_birthdate, relationship_to_insured, insured_id_no, product_code, sum_insured, annual_premium, application_status, submission_time, review_time, reviewed_by, rejection_reason, created_by FROM policy_application WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE policy_application SET applicant_id_no = #{applicantIdNo}, applicant_name = #{applicantName}, applicant_gender = #{applicantGender}, applicant_birthdate = #{applicantBirthdate}, relationship_to_insured = #{relationshipToInsured}, insured_id_no = #{insuredIdNo}, product_code = #{productCode}, sum_insured = #{sumInsured}, annual_premium = #{annualPremium}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND application_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE policy_application SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND application_status = 'PENDING'
